expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: modern grid banding scenarios distinguish styling variants, interactions, and backward-compatible rendering outcomes
expectations.evidence: The output explains what would be needed, but explicitly states it cannot confirm coverage in an actual Phase 4a draft because required artifacts are missing: "Cannot fully assess phase4a compliance / pass the case focus using provided evidence alone" and "does not include any of the required Phase 4a runtime inputs/outputs... drafts/qa_plan_phase4a_r1.md". Advisory notes list expected scenarios, but that is not verified coverage in the produced Phase 4a output.
